name: Blacksmith
unlockCondition: 2,000,000 ducats capital, Metal Workers Guild connection
calculationsAnalysis: The Blacksmith represents basic metal production with modest but reliable returns. The construction cost of 750,000 ducats reflects the forge and specialized equipment required, while the income of 12,000 ducats (1.6% return) represents sales of metal goods and components. The maintenance cost of 20,000 ducats (167% of income) creates a negative profit margin reflecting the essential but resource-intensive nature of basic metalworking. The employment capacity of 5 represents the blacksmith, apprentices, and assistants needed. The construction time of 2 days (172800000ms) reflects the straightforward construction requirements. This building creates an accessible investment in metal production that supports numerous other industries, reflecting the historical importance of blacksmiths in Venice's industrial ecosystem, where metal components were essential for shipbuilding, construction, and daily life.
shortDescription: Workshop producing iron tools, fittings, and basic metal goods for everyday use.
fullDescription: An essential service in any district, blacksmiths craft the metal components needed for construction, shipping, and daily life. Featuring a forge, anvils, quenching tanks, and metalworking tools, these workshops combine practical craftsmanship with industrial production. From nails and hinges to tools and decorative ironwork, blacksmiths support nearly every other industry in Venice.
flavorText: Without my hinges, your doors would not swing; without my nails, your ships would come apart; without my locks, your wealth would vanish—yet few think of the blacksmith until something breaks.

locationRequirements.districtRestrictions: All districts, often in industrial zones
locationRequirements.adjacentRequirements: Water access for cooling, separation from residential due to noise

constructionPhase3DPrompt: Renaissance Venetian blacksmith shop under construction, industrial workshop with central forge area being built, chimney and ventilation system taking shape, anvil mounting blocks being set, water quenching tanks being installed, fuel storage area, tool wall framework, workbenches for detailed metal finishing, customer transaction area, metal storage with security features, heavy foundational work to support weighty equipment, isometric game perspective, stylized but detailed, focus on the forge as central feature
completedBuilding3DPrompt: Completed Renaissance Venetian blacksmith shop, working industrial facility with glowing forge at center, blacksmith working red-hot iron on large anvil, sparks flying, apprentices pumping bellows and assisting with larger pieces, various tools hanging on walls (hammers, tongs, punches, chisels), quenching tank steaming as hot metal is cooled, finished products displayed (hinges, locks, tools, nails, decorative items), order slips from shipwrights and builders, smoke rising from chimney, small retail area for direct sales, historically accurate but slightly stylized for game aesthetic, isometric game perspective, dramatic lighting from forge fire, sense of essential industry, contrast between dark workshop and glowing metal, sturdy practical construction built to withstand intense heat and heavy work

soundDesign.ambientSound: Hammering on anvil, bellows pumping, forge roaring
soundDesign.activitySounds: Metal being quenched with steam hiss, filing, customer orders

seasonalEffects.winter: More comfortable working conditions, higher heating efficiency
seasonalEffects.summer: Extremely hot working conditions, reduced efficiency
